title: Cheesy Ukrainian Paneer Lasagna
description: A rich and creamy lacto-vegetarian lasagna featuring paneer, perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Slowly add heavy cream, whisking continuously until smooth.
Bring mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Stir in grated cheddar and parmesan cheese until melted.
Combine cooked lasagna noodles, cheese sauce, and chopped paneer in a large bowl.
Spoon lasagna noodles into a baking dish, followed by a layer of cheese sauce and paneer mixture.
Repeat layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese sauce on top.
Dot the top with unsalted butter and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes or until golden brown.
